Feb 06, 2026

Collaboration Meeting Held Between Doğuş University and TEKNOFEST

Led by Vice Rector Prof. Dr. Erkut Altındağ, the Doğuş University delegation visited TEKNOFEST Secretary General Muhammet Saymaz to discuss potential cooperation. The meeting focused on joint projects, student competitions, and academic contributions.

Feb 03, 2026

AI as a Pedagogical Partner in Language Education

workshop. In this section, instructors from the Foreign Languages Unit experimented with classroom-oriented prompting strategies and designed AI-supported learning activities that are directly usable and adaptable to their own teaching contexts.

Deputy Consul General of Turkmenistan, Mr. Merdan MUSTAKOV, visited Doğuş University.

During the visit, our University Rector Prof. Dr. Ahmet Alkan ÇELİK and Vice Rector Prof. Dr. Erkut ALTINDAĞ discussed topics related to developing academic cooperation and cultural relations between the two countries.

We Are Placed In New URAP Report with Our Studies In Pyhsic

Doğuş University has showed its difference and has left a lot of state and private universities behind in new URAP (University Ranking by Academic Performance) Report in which the universities in special to Turkey have been ranked.

3. Chinese Consolate General Scholarship Has Been Entitled to Get by Our Students

This year, the third Chinese Consolate General Scholarship which is annually given to the successful students by People’s Republic of China İstanbul Consolate General has been entitled to get by our three students.

Apr 05, 2019

DOĞUŞ WINS THE MOST CREATIVE PROJECT AWARD FROM TEMA

The Environment and Sustainable Life Club, representing Doğuş University, has attended the Young Theme Coordination meeting organized by TEMA Foundation in March. The meeting has been held in Antalya with over 160 participants from 56 different cities and 83 different universities.

WE ARE AMONG THE VERY BEST FOUR IN TURKEY IN WEBOMETRIC RANKINGS

Dogus University ranked fourth in the 2018-2019 ranking of Webometrics.

Mar 22, 2019

Election for Student Representative

Elections that will be held to constitute our university’s student council representatives, faculty and student board have been postponed due to the updates by Higher Education Board (YÖK). Election for student representatives has been postponed to another date that will be announced later on.
